<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaaldraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-sìng]][[de:Metall-Drache]][[fr:Dragon de métal]][[hak:Kâng-sìn]][[ja:庚辰]][[ko:경진]][[nds:Metall-Draken]][[vi:Canh Thìn]][[za:Gengsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-sîn]][[zh-yue:庚辰]][[zh:庚辰]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaaldraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-sìng]][[de:Metall-Drache]][[fr:Dragon de métal]][[hak:Kâng-sìn]][[ja:庚辰]][[ko:경진]][[nds:Metall-Draken]][[vi:Canh Thìn]][[za:Gengsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-sîn]][[zh-yue:庚辰]][[zh:庚辰]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaaldraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-sìng]][[de:Metall-Drache]][[fr:Dragon de métal]][[hak:Kâng-sìn]][[ja:庚辰]][[ko:경진]][[nds:Metall-Draken]][[vi:Canh Thìn]][[za:Gengsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-sîn]][[zh-yue:庚辰]][[zh:庚辰]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Dragon|kanji=庚辰|romaji=kanoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=gēngchén|w=keng-ch'en|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ʈ͡ʂʰən|y=geng1 san4|j=geng1 san4|ci=kɪŋ sɐn|mc=kæŋ ɖin|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ɖiŋ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Metal Dragon also known as 庚辰''' (kanoetatsu, koukinnotatsu, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 17th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinshi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Dragon|ja|辰|1=chén|lt=Dragon (辰)|2=ja|3=辰|1=Dragon (zodiac)|lt=Dragon (辰)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Dragon (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Dragon (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16538966}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a generating relationship ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Earth generates Metal).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Metal Dragon (庚辰)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tatsu
***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tatsu
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongjin (경진)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Thìn

<!--
==
* Yang Metal Dragon (庚辰) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gang1 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: かのえたつ (kanoe-tatsu)
***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu)
***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyeongjin
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Thìn

-->
==Years of Yang Metal Dragon==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 20 when divided by 60 is a year of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}}).
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Metal Dragon (庚辰)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium BC|en|1st millennium BC|WD=Q25716|lt=1st Millennium BC|1=1st millennium BC}} !! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|941 BC|ja|紀元前941年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/941 BC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/941 BC|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=紀元前10世紀|1=10th century BC|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q25425}}
* {{ill|881 BC|ja|紀元前881年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/881 BC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/881 BC|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=紀元前9世紀|1=9th century BC|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q25424}}
* {{ill|821 BC|ja|紀元前821年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/821 BC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/821 BC|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=821 BC|WD=Q762894}}
* {{ill|761 BC|ja|紀元前761年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/761 BC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/761 BC|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=761 BC|WD=Q1133172}}
* {{ill|701 BC|ja|紀元前701年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/701 BC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/701 BC|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=701 BC|WD=Q716987}}
* {{ill|641 BC|en|641 BC|WD=Q1059311|lt=641 BC|1=641 BC}}
* {{ill|581 BC|en|581 BC|WD=Q244721|lt=581 BC|1=581 BC}}
* {{ill|521 BC|en|521 BC|WD=Q220807|lt=521 BC|1=521 BC}}
* {{ill|461 BC|en|461 BC|WD=Q235531|lt=461 BC|1=461 BC}}
* {{ill|401 BC|en|401 BC|WD=Q231599|lt=401 BC|1=401 BC}}
* {{ill|341 BC|en|341 BC|WD=Q80155|lt=341 BC|1=341 BC}}
* {{ill|281 BC|en|281 BC|WD=Q75664|lt=281 BC|1=281 BC}}
* {{ill|221 BC|en|221 BC|WD=Q47538|lt=221 BC|1=221 BC}}
* {{ill|161 BC|en|161 BC|WD=Q46648|lt=161 BC|1=161 BC}}
* {{ill|101 BC|en|101 BC|WD=Q42218|lt=101 BC|1=101 BC}}
* {{ill|41 BC|en|41 BC|WD=Q4193|lt=41 BC|1=41 BC}}
|
* {{ill|AD 20|en|AD 20|WD=Q23236|lt=20 AD|1=AD 20}}
* {{ill|AD 80|en|AD 80|WD=Q30427|lt=80 AD|1=AD 80}}
* {{ill|AD 140|en|AD 140|WD=Q30664|lt=140 AD|1=AD 140}}
* {{ill|200|en|200|WD=Q23813|lt=200 AD|1=200}}
* {{ill|260|en|260|WD=Q30311|lt=260 AD|1=260}}
* {{ill|320|en|320|WD=Q30950|lt=320 AD|1=320}}
* {{ill|380|en|380|WD=Q34157|lt=380 AD|1=380}}
* {{ill|440|en|440|WD=Q49180|lt=440 AD|1=440}}
* {{ill|AD 500|en|AD 500|WD=Q23610|lt=500 AD|1=AD 500}}
* {{ill|560|en|560|WD=Q32769|lt=560 AD|1=560}}
* {{ill|620|en|620|WD=Q33238|lt=620 AD|1=620}}
* {{ill|680|en|680|WD=Q23453|lt=680 AD|1=680}}
* {{ill|740|en|740|WD=Q23593|lt=740 AD|1=740}}
* {{ill|800|en|800|WD=Q23677|lt=800 AD|1=800}}
* {{ill|860|en|860|WD=Q24714|lt=860 AD|1=860}}
* {{ill|920|en|920|WD=Q24857|lt=920 AD|1=920}}
* {{ill|980|en|980|WD=Q23458|lt=980 AD|1=980}}
|
* {{ill|1040|en|1040|WD=Q19342|lt=1040 AD|1=1040}}
* {{ill|1100|en|1100|WD=Q10660|lt=1100 AD|1=1100}}
* {{ill|1160|en|1160|WD=Q19662|lt=1160 AD|1=1160}}
* {{ill|1220|en|1220|WD=Q5392|lt=1220 AD|1=1220}}
* {{ill|1280|en|1280|WD=Q5536|lt=1280 AD|1=1280}}
* {{ill|1340|en|1340|WD=Q6056|lt=1340 AD|1=1340}}
* {{ill|1400|en|1400|WD=Q6108|lt=1400 AD|1=1400}}
* {{ill|1460|en|1460|WD=Q6528|lt=1460 AD|1=1460}}
* {{ill|1520|en|1520|WD=Q6284|lt=1520 AD|1=1520}}
* {{ill|1580|en|1580|WD=Q6712|lt=1580 AD|1=1580}}
* {{ill|1640|en|1640|WD=Q6901|lt=1640 AD|1=1640}}
* {{ill|1700|en|1700|WD=Q6813|lt=1700 AD|1=1700}}
* {{ill|1760|en|1760|WD=Q7646|lt=1760 AD|1=1760}}
* {{ill|1820|en|1820|WD=Q6973|lt=1820 AD|1=1820}}
* {{ill|1880|en|1880|WD=Q7806|lt=1880 AD|1=1880}}
* {{ill|1940|en|1940|WD=Q18633|lt=1940 AD|1=1940}}
* {{ill|2000|en|2000|WD=Q1985|lt=2000 AD|1=2000}}
|
* {{ill|2060 AD|ja|2060年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2060|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2060 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2060年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2120 AD|ja|2120年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2120|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2120 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2180 AD|ja|2180年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2180|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2180 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2240 AD|ja|2240年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2240|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2240 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2300 AD|ja|2300年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2300|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2300 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2360 AD|ja|2360年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2360|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2360 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=24世紀|1=24th century|WD=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2420 AD|ja|2420年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2420|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2420 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2480 AD|ja|2480年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2480|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2480 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2540 AD|ja|2540年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2540|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2540 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2600 AD|ja|2600年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2600|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2600 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2660 AD|ja|2660年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2660|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2660 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2720 AD|ja|2720年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2720|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2720 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2780 AD|ja|2780年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2780|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2780 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2840 AD|ja|2840年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2840|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2840 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2900 AD|ja|2900年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2900|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2900 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2960 AD|ja|2960年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2960|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2960 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yang Metal Dragon==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March|1=March}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Dragon==
* {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|WD=Q200188|lt=Emperor Jimmu|1=Emperor Jimmu}} (the founder and first {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor|1=Emperor of Japan}} of {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|WD=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}})'s birthday.

=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Keng-chá]]
[[zh-yue:庚辰]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=ja|庚辰|qq=Yang Metal Dragon|version=98658192|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Káng-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Metall-Drachteen]]
[[de:Yang Metal Dragon]]

[[ja:庚辰]]
[[zh:庚辰]]
[[ko:경진]]
[[fr:Dragon de métal]]
[[de:Metall-Drache]]

[[af:Metaaldraak (astrologie)]]
[[de:Metall-Drachteen]]
[[en:Metal Dragon]]
[[fr:Dragon de métalboishak]]
[[it:Kang-chṳ́id]]

[[vi:Canh Thìn]]
[[za:Gengceij]]
[[ar:Yang Metal Dragon]]

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Gĕng-sìng]]
[[hak:Kâng-sìn]]
[[nds:Metall-Draken]]
[[za:Gengsaenz]]
[[zh-min-nan:Keng-sîn]]
[[zh-yue:庚辰]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Gĕng-sìng]]
[[hak:Kâng-sìn]]
[[nds:Metall-Draken]]
[[za:Gengsaenz]]
[[zh-min-nan:Keng-sîn]]
[[zh-yue:庚辰]]
{{wikidata link|Q1062146}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
